input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.3.1
            TITLE: location

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.3.1: Location
T.9.3.1 Location 
a. On the driver’s right hand side of the vehicle 
b. In proximity to the Main Hoop 
c. At the driver's shoulder height  
d. Able to be easily actuated from outside the vehicle

final_answer: rule T.9.3.1: Location T.9.3.1 Location a. On the driver’s right hand side of the vehicle b. In proximity to the Main Hoop c. At the driver's shoulder height d. Able to be easily actuated from outside the vehicle
